name: Strawberry Frost
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Frozen strawberries, no sugar added
A few sprigs of fresh mint
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or with a food processor fitted with a metal blade, combine the yogurt, ricotta, frozen strawberries, vanilla extract, and orange juice.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Spoon the mixture into parfait glasses.
4. Garnish with berries and a mint sprig, if desired.
5. Serve immediately.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 Milk Exchange + 1/2 Fruit Exchange
CAL: 81; CHO: 6g; CAR: 13g; PRO: 5g; SOD: 72g; FAT: 1g
